name: QueryDataRequest
description: Request body for querying data from a web page.

url.description: The URL of the web page to query.

html.description: Raw HTML content to query instead of a URL.

query.description: AgentQL query string for structured data extraction.

prompt.description: Natural language description of the data to extract (alternative to query).
prompt.example: Extract the top 10 posts with their titles, links, and scores
